zh.lifeSummary: Joane Waldron於1501年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特格藍維也斯 伍頓。她和Thomas Lovell至少有1個兒子。她去世於1600年在她的家鄉享年99歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特格藍維也斯 伍頓。

nameMeanings.name: Waldron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Mayo): from the Norman personal name Waleran, Galeran (ancient Germanic Walahram, Old French Galeran(t)), composed of the ancient Germanic elements walh ‘foreigner’ + hrafn ‘raven’. Compare Walraven . In Ireland, where it is common, this name was Gaelicized early as Mac Bhalronta, also later as Mac Bhaildrin and de Bhaldraithe.
English: habitational name from a place in Sussex named Waldron. The placename derives from Old English wald ‘woodland’ + ærn ‘building’.

History: This is the name of a prominent NH family, established there since the 17th century. Richard Walderne (born c. 1615) came to New England from Alchester, Warwickshire, England, c. 1640 and settled at Dover, NH.

variants.name: Walraven
meanings: German and Dutch: from Walravan, a personal name composed of the elements wal ‘battlefield’ + hraban ‘raven’. The personal name was popular among knights and patricians of the Lower Rhine and Upper Swabian region, where the surname is still common. This surname is also found in England.

variants.name: Walrond
meanings: English (Somerset and Devon): of Normin origin, a variant of   Waldron  .

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

en.lifeSummary: Joane Waldron was born in 1501, in Glanvilles Wootton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 1 son with Thomas Lovell. She died in 1600, in her hometown, at the age of 99, and was buried in Glanvilles Wootton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Joane Waldron est née en 1501, à Glanvilles Wootton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Thomas Lovell. Elle est décédée en 1600, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Glanvilles Wootton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Waldronは1501年にイギリスイギリスドールセトグランヴィレス ウットオンで生まれた。彼女はThomas Lovellとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1600年に故郷で99歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトグランヴィレス ウットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Waldron(은)는 1501년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 글랜비레스 보턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Thomas Lovell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 그녀의 고향에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 글랜비레스 보턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Joane Waldron родилась в 1501 г. в местности гланвиллесь вуттон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Thomas Lovell. Она умерла в 1600 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности гланвиллесь вуттон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
